title: Pad 673
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pad 673''' was a landing pad on [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]. It was on this platform that [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] landed the ''[[Skorp-Ion]]'' in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]''
